case_title: MARIA ANNA LIZA GINO CLAIRMONT VS. CECILIO ASUNCION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CLAIRMONT, MARIA ANNA LIZA GINO AS TO DEFENDANT ASUNCION, CECILIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $192.40J) SERVED APR-15-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ASUNCION, CECILIO
FILED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. FILED BY DEFENDANT ASUNCION, CECILIO AS TO PLAINTIFF CLAIRMONT, MARIA ANNA LIZA GINO
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CLAIRMONT, MARIA ANNA LIZA GINO
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MARIA ANNA LIZZA GINO CLAIRMONT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CECILIO ASUNCION IS NOT PRESENT. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN FINDS THAT THE WRONG DEFENDANT WAS NAMED IN THIS CLAIM AND DISMISSES THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 5-29-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER VENUE IS PROPER CASE CONTINUED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. WRONG DEFENDANT NAMED IN CASE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-29-2019 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-27-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. HONORABLE A.JAMES ROBERTSON II FINDS THE VENUE IS PROPER AND CONTINUES THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF MARIA ANNA LIZA GINO CLAIMONT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CECILIO ASUNCION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
